description: Phase 12 retrieval/grounding smoke questions. Point raw_dir at your corpus; adjust expected_keywords per your files.

questions.query: What is this document mainly about?
List three factual claims that appear explicitly in the uploaded text.
What headings or section titles are mentioned?
Quote or paraphrase one sentence that defines a key term.
Summarize the introduction in two sentences using only the provided excerpts.
What dates, numbers, or percentages appear in the documents?
What limitations or caveats does the text state about its own content?
Compare how two different sections describe the same topic, if both appear.
Extract any bullet lists or enumerated steps mentioned.
What is the full name of the author or organization, if stated?
differences between sections or versions described in the text
What does the document say about chunking or embeddings or retrieval, if anything?
